title: IOSH Managing Safely (3-day classroom)
summary: Benchmark managers' safety qualification — 3-day in-person delivery for up to 20 learners.

title: IOSH Working Safely (1-day)
summary: Foundation safety awareness for the whole workforce. Live online or on-site.
deliverables: 1 day of live delivery (online or on-site)

title: NEBOSH International General Certificate (blended)
summary: Industry-standard HSE qualification — 12-week blended cohort with assessment support.

title: ISO 45001 implementation support
summary: Build or upgrade your occupational health & safety management system, gap to certified.

title: Internal verification + EQA support
summary: Awarding-body audit-readiness for centres delivering IOSH/OSHAcademy/HABC qualifications.
deliverables: Quarterly IV sampling against awarding-body standards

title: Corporate HSE onboarding programme
summary: Tailored induction track covering site safety, PPE, emergency procedures, and a cultural alignment module.
deliverables: Discovery workshop with HSE & HR leads
Bespoke 4-module e-learning track in your LMS

title: ISO 9001 quality management implementation
summary: End-to-end ISO 9001:2015 quality management system implementation — gap analysis to certification audit.
deliverables: On-site gap analysis against ISO 9001:2015 (2 days)
Quality manual, policies and SOP set

title: ISO 14001 environmental management implementation
summary: ISO 14001:2015 environmental management system — aspects/impacts register through to certification.

title: Integrated Management System (9001 + 14001 + 45001)
summary: Single, harmonised IMS combining quality, environment, and OH&S in one document architecture.
deliverables: Unified IMS gap analysis against all three standards
Single document set with cross-mapped controls

title: Annual management system audit programme
summary: Independent internal audit cycle covering ISO 9001/14001/45001 — quarterly visits, evidence-based reports.
deliverables: Annual audit schedule aligned to your management review
Evidence-based findings report after each visit

title: LOLER lifting-equipment inspection
summary: Statutory thorough examination of lifting equipment per LOLER 1998 (UK) / equivalent regional regs.
deliverables: On-site thorough examination of all in-scope equipment
Aggregate findings report with corrective actions
Re-inspection of corrective actions within 30 days

title: Site safety inspection programme
summary: Cyclic on-site HSE inspections with photographic evidence and a corrective-action tracker.
deliverables: Monthly site inspections (up to 4 hrs each)
Quarterly trend dashboard for the leadership team

title: Pre-commissioning HSE inspection
summary: Independent verification that a new asset is safe to put into operation — reads to the asset register.
deliverables: Sign-off report to the project director

title: Annual statutory inspection retainer
summary: Centralised contract covering all your statutory examinations across multiple sites.
deliverables: Single SLA across all sites & equipment classes

title: HSE feasibility study
summary: Risk-aware feasibility for new projects — identifies HSE blockers, regulatory triggers and design pinch-points before commit.
deliverables: HSE cost envelope and timeline impact

title: Safety in Design (CDM-style) advisor
summary: Embeds HSE into the design process so designers eliminate or reduce risks at source.
deliverables: Hazard elimination workshops with the design team
Residual-risk register handed to the build team

title: Incident investigation + root-cause analysis
summary: Independent investigation of HSE incidents — TapRoot/5-Why methodology, board-ready report, prevention plan.

title: Construction-phase safety inspections
summary: Weekly site inspections during the build, contractor compliance scoring and corrective-action tracking.

title: HSE compliance audit
summary: Independent audit of HSE performance against your declared management system and applicable law.
deliverables: Audit plan agreed with HSE leadership
Re-audit of major findings within 60 days
